title: Brazilian Day Sydney
description: Annual Brazilian culture festival with live music, food, and dance. Free entry.

title: Lunar New Year Festival
description: Sydney's biggest Lunar New Year celebration. Dragon boat races, lion dances, and market stalls.

title: Diwali Fair Sydney
description: Festival of lights celebration with traditional food, Bollywood performances, and fireworks.

title: Tết Festival
description: Vietnamese New Year celebration. Traditional food, performances, and dragon dances.
